scheduler.schedule.kinesisparameters.Cfn: The templated target type for the Amazon Kinesis [kinesis/latest/APIReference/API_PutRecord.html](kinesis/latest/APIReference/API_PutRecord.html) API operation.

scheduler.schedule.kinesisparameters.Par.Description: Specifies the shard to which EventBridge Scheduler sends the event. For more information, see [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams terminology and concepts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/streams/latest/dev/key-concepts.html) in the *Amazon Kinesis Streams Developer Guide*.
